purpose: Create the final Atlas map artwork without using, tracing, compositing, or shipping any third-party map image or vector artwork.
allowedInputs: repository location identifiers and normalized coordinates
confirmed geospatial anchors and their evidence metadata
gameplay evidence used only to verify factual relative placement
new procedural geometry and artwork authored specifically for Atlas
forbiddenInputs: traced coastlines, roads, terrain, labels, textures or decorative elements
screenshots composited into the final map
automatic promotion of the legacy 4096 preview image

phases.gate: 3430 locations grouped into 9 regions with deterministic hulls, density field and adjacency graph
original region masses, water gaps and authored travel corridors approved
original mountains, forests, rivers, roads, paper texture and labels approved
repository-owned source, exported dimensions, crop, origin and SHA-256 frozen
24 control points fitted and all 12 independent holdouts pass
desktop, phone and physical iPad validation pass

nextAction: build deterministic original spatial skeleton from all location data and the 50 confirmed anchors
